name: Reduce water absorption of a plaster
intent: Reduce water absorption of the plaster.

nodes.rationale: gather what drives absorption for this substrate (pores, capillarity, surface energy)
infer the dominant cause(s) of high absorption — ranked hypotheses
advise the mechanism/material lever most likely to help under constraints
explain how e.g. silane binding blocks capillarity -> lower uptake

successCriteria: Ranked candidate causes, each with provenance.
A recommended lever expressed as a hypothesis, with what would validate it.
A mechanism explanation the non-chemist can follow.
